response:
Si le revenu d'une personne et/ou son statut d'emploi change, il peut y avoir un transfert de responsabilité institutionnelle ; dans ce cas, il y aura une nouvelle évaluation.  


This translation maintains the formal tone and precise meaning of the original text. "Income and/or employment status" is rendered as "revenu d'une personne et/ou son statut d'emploi," "transfer of institutional responsibility" as "transfert de responsabilité institutionnelle," and "new assessment" as "nouvelle évaluation." The structure "in which case" is smoothly conveyed by "dans ce cas," ensuring clarity and flow.
